sn22.45:1.0.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, form is impermanent. What is impermanent is suffering.sn.iii.45What is suffering is nonself. What is nonself should be seen as it really is with correct wisdom thus: ‘This is not mine, this I am not, this is not my self.’ When one sees this thus as it really is with correct wisdom, the mind becomes dispassionate and is liberated from the taints by nonclinging.
